existing_features.title: Implement the useSearch custom hook that calls the backend actor's search function, URL-encodes the query, validates the JSON response, extracts meaningful error messages from ICP canister traps, and exposes loading, error, and results state to consuming components.

Implement the SearchInterface component that renders a search form, handles submission, displays loading/error/empty states, flattens DuckDuckGo topic groups into a flat results list, and opens result links in the InAppBrowser overlay component.

Implement the InAppBrowser component as a fullscreen modal overlay that displays an external URL in an iframe, includes a header bar with the URL, a loading spinner while the iframe loads, a close button to dismiss the overlay, and a fallback link to open the URL in a new tab.

Apply a cohesive dark-themed visual design across the entire application using a dark background with high-contrast foreground text, clean sans-serif typography, and a minimal card-based layout for search results. Define OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the color system and ensure light/dark theme tokens are consistent throughout.

new_feature_requests.summary: Implement a Motoko backend actor that performs HTTP outcalls to the DuckDuckGo API (https://api.duckduckgo.com/?q={query}&format=json) to fetch search results, parses and returns the JSON response, and handles HTTP errors gracefully with descriptive error messages.
